title: Oxymeris heterobasis
taxonomy: Oxymeris heterobasis is a species of sea snail within the family Terebridae. It belongs to the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and is a marine species. The classification of Oxymeris heterobasis is further divided into several taxonomic ranks, including order Trochida, superfamily Clavatelloidea, and family Terebridae. This species is known to be part of the subfamily Terebrinae within the family Terebridae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source or the latest scientific research.
